sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100881" key="sunorigna/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοριγνάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n100881.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">desire together</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ πλείονος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
